sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n24187" key="desmofula/keion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δεσμο-φῠλάκειον</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ᾰ]</pron>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n24187.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">prison,</tr_> ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.100</biblScope> </bibl> <date TEIform="date">(iii A.D.)</date>.</sense> </entryFree>
